tailwind.colorTokens: background, foreground, muted, border, primary, destructive, slate-50..950

patterns.spacing: Section py-20 px-6; form stack gap-5; field label-input gap-1.5
patterns.typography: Inter sans. h2 text-3xl bold, label text-sm medium, body text-base, error text-xs
conventions: Every interactive control has a programmatic label (htmlFor + id, not visual proximity)
Errors use aria-describedby; aria-invalid set when validation fails
Submit is a <button type='submit'>, never a styled div
